description: Hand-curated test cases for email classifier. 50 cases across billing/technical/account/general with deliberate edge cases.

cases.input: Hi, I was double-charged $49 on my last invoice. Please refund the extra amount.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer requests refund for a duplicate $49 charge.

cases.input: Can you send me an invoice for last month's subscription? I need it for tax purposes.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer needs last month's invoice for tax records.

cases.input: Why did my plan suddenly cost $99 this month when it was $79 before?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer questions an unexpected price increase from $79 to $99.

cases.input: I'd like to cancel my subscription and get a prorated refund.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer wants to cancel subscription with a prorated refund.

cases.input: My credit card on file expired. How do I update payment?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer needs to update an expired credit card on file.
cases.notes: Could be account but it's a payment method change

cases.input: do u have any disocunt for studnts??
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks about student discounts.

cases.input: The export-to-PDF button has been broken for 3 days. Nothing happens when I click it.
cases.ideal_summary: Export-to-PDF button is unresponsive and has been broken for 3 days.

cases.input: I keep getting a 500 error when calling the /v2/users endpoint with a valid token.
cases.ideal_summary: API /v2/users endpoint returns 500 errors despite valid auth.

cases.input: App crashes on Android 14 every time I open the dashboard.
cases.ideal_summary: App crashes on the dashboard screen on Android 14.

cases.input: Login isn't working — keeps saying invalid credentials but I'm 100% sure my password is right.
cases.ideal_summary: Login fails with invalid-credentials error despite correct password.
cases.notes: Ambiguous: could be technical (bug) or account (password)

cases.input: Dashboard takes 30+ seconds to load on Chrome.
cases.ideal_summary: Dashboard load time exceeds 30 seconds on Chrome.

cases.input: webhooks not firing for 2 days now
cases.ideal_summary: Webhooks have not been firing for the past two days.

cases.input: Encountered "ECONNRESET" in our integration. Tried 3 retries, still failing.
cases.ideal_summary: Integration repeatedly fails with ECONNRESET errors.

cases.input: Page renders fine but submit button does nothing on iOS Safari.
cases.ideal_summary: Submit button is unresponsive on iOS Safari.

cases.input: Forgot my password. Tried reset but never got the email.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer needs password reset; reset email isn't arriving.

cases.input: How do I change my email address on my profile?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer wants to change the email address on their profile.

cases.input: I want to delete my account permanently and remove all my data.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer requests permanent account and data deletion.

cases.input: Can I add a teammate to my workspace? They need admin access.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer wants to add a teammate with admin access to their workspace.

cases.input: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks how to enable 2FA.

cases.input: Pls change my name to Jonathan Smith from John Smith on my account
cases.ideal_summary: Customer requests name change from John Smith to Jonathan Smith.

cases.input: I love your product. The new sidebar is so much cleaner!
cases.ideal_summary: Customer shares positive feedback about the new sidebar design.

cases.input: Would you ever consider adding dark mode? It would be a huge help for late-night work.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer requests a dark mode feature.

cases.input: Hi! I'm a journalist writing about productivity tools. Could I interview your founder?
cases.ideal_summary: Journalist requests an interview with the founder for an article on productivity tools.

cases.input: Do you have an API rate-limit page somewhere? Couldn't find it in docs.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks where to find API rate-limit documentation.
cases.notes: Could be general (docs) or technical (API). Bias to general since it's a docs question.

cases.input: Are you hiring? I'd love to apply.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks whether the company is hiring.

cases.input: When's the next product update coming out?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks when the next product update will be released.

cases.input: help
cases.ideal_summary: Customer message is too vague to determine intent.
Customer message contains only punctuation.

cases.input: Oh great, ANOTHER outage. Third one this week. Brilliant work, team.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer reports a third outage this week with sarcastic frustration.

cases.input: Hola, mi factura del mes pasado no llegó. ¿Pueden reenviarla?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer says last month's invoice didn't arrive and asks for it to be resent.

cases.input: Want to upgrade plan AND fix this 500 error AND need to add a teammate. Thanks.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer raises three separate concerns: plan upgrade, a 500 error, and adding a teammate.
cases.notes: Multi-intent — billing + technical + account. Bias to general since no single category dominates.

cases.input: I think your service is overpriced compared to competitors.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer feels the service is overpriced versus competitors.
cases.notes: Pricing feedback — could be billing but it's commentary not a transaction

cases.input: your app keeps loging me out evry 2 mins its very anoying
cases.ideal_summary: Customer is being logged out every two minutes and finds it disruptive.

cases.input: Why why why why why does the sync keep failing
cases.ideal_summary: Customer is frustrated about repeated sync failures.

cases.input: Quick Q: is there a way to bulk-export contacts as CSV?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks if there's a way to bulk-export contacts as CSV.

cases.input: Charged me twice AND the second charge failed the bank's 3DS check so now my card is frozen. Help.
cases.ideal_summary: Duplicate charge resulted in a 3DS failure that froze the customer's card.

cases.input: Pls send refund asap, I cancelled last week and was charged again today.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer was charged after cancellation and requests an urgent refund.

cases.input: What does the 'Pro' tier actually include?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks what features are included in the Pro tier.
cases.notes: Plan question — leans general/sales rather than billing dispute

cases.input: Search returns wrong results for non-English queries.
cases.ideal_summary: Search returns inaccurate results for non-English queries.

cases.input: CSV upload fails silently — no error, no row inserted.
cases.ideal_summary: CSV upload fails silently without errors and inserts no rows.

cases.input: How can I see who in my org has admin permissions?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer asks how to view admin users in their organization.

cases.input: Need to merge two accounts I accidentally created with different emails.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer needs two duplicate accounts merged.

cases.input: Could you publish your uptime SLA somewhere public?
cases.ideal_summary: Customer requests public publication of the uptime SLA.

cases.input: Hey, just saying hi from Bangalore 👋
cases.ideal_summary: Customer sends a casual greeting from Bangalore.

cases.input: Plan upgrade? Bug report? Both? Honestly I just want to talk to a human.
cases.ideal_summary: Customer is frustrated and wants to speak to a human; intent unclear.

cases.input: subject: invoice not received\n\nbody: see subject
cases.ideal_summary: Customer reports an invoice was not received.
